groups.name: Primary navigation
groups.desc: Top-level tabs for the project manager demo.

targets.name: Board tab
targets.desc: Open the kanban board.

targets.name: Members tab
targets.desc: Open the team member table.

targets.name: Docs tab
targets.desc: Open the document viewer.

targets.name: Workflow tab
targets.desc: Open the workflow editor.

targets.name: Messenger tab
targets.desc: Open the team messenger to direct-message teammates.

groups.name: Kanban board
groups.desc: Targets for creating, opening, editing, deleting, and moving tasks.

targets.name: New task
targets.desc: Open the task creation wizard.
targets.onSuccess: The task creation wizard opened. It collects details across several steps; fill the fields shown on the current step, then use Next to advance.

targets.name: To Do column
targets.desc: Drop tasks into the To Do column.

targets.name: In Progress column
targets.desc: Drop tasks into the In Progress column.

targets.name: In Review column
targets.desc: Drop tasks into the In Review column.

targets.name: Done column
targets.desc: Drop tasks into the Done column.

targets.name: Open task card
targets.desc: Open one of the visible task cards by index.

targets.name: Task card drag source
targets.desc: Use one of the visible task cards as a drag source by index.

targets.name: Delete task
targets.desc: Delete one of the visible task cards by index.

targets.name: Open task card
targets.desc: Open a task card details dialog.

targets.name: Task card drag source
targets.desc: Use the task card as a drag source for board moves.

targets.name: Delete task
targets.desc: Delete this task card.

groups.name: Task creation wizard
groups.desc: Targets for the three-step new task wizard.

targets.name: Wizard task name
targets.desc: Fill the task name in the new task wizard.

targets.name: Wizard status
targets.desc: Open the task status picker in the new task wizard.

targets.name: Wizard priority
targets.desc: Open the priority picker in the new task wizard.

targets.name: Wizard assignee
targets.desc: Open the teammate picker. Type to filter, then click one name; selecting it sets the assignee and closes the picker — you do not need to reopen it to confirm.
targets.onSuccess: The assignee picker opened. Type in its search field to filter teammates, then click the teammate you want from the listed options.

targets.name: Wizard assignee search
targets.desc: Type to filter the open assignee combobox by name or role.

targets.name: Wizard description
targets.desc: Task description. Required: the wizard will not advance to the next step until this field has text.

targets.name: Wizard due date
targets.desc: Fill the due date in the new task wizard.

targets.name: Wizard estimated hours
targets.desc: Fill the estimated hours in the new task wizard.

targets.name: Wizard back
targets.desc: Move to the previous wizard step.
targets.onSuccess: Moved back to the previous wizard step; its fields are shown again.

targets.name: Wizard next
targets.desc: Move to the next wizard step.
targets.onSuccess: Advanced to the next wizard step. Read the newly shown fields before continuing.
targets.onNoEffect: Still on the same step — Next is blocked because a required field here is empty or invalid. Complete the required field(s) shown on this step (for example, the description), then press Next again.

targets.name: Wizard create task
targets.desc: Create the task from the wizard confirmation step.
targets.onSuccess: The task was created and the wizard closed — you are back on the board, where the new task now appears as a card.
targets.onNoEffect: The task was not created — a required field is still missing, so the wizard stayed open. Complete the required field(s), then create again.

targets.name: Wizard close
targets.desc: Close the task creation wizard.

targets.name: Wizard description preview toggle
targets.desc: Show or hide the read-only description preview (step 2). Cosmetic only — reveals no new control.

targets.name: Wizard advanced options toggle
targets.desc: Expand or collapse the advanced options section (step 2), which reveals the story points and reviewer fields.

targets.name: Wizard story points
targets.desc: Fill the story points estimate. Inside advanced options — expand it first.

targets.name: Wizard reviewer
targets.desc: Fill the reviewer name. Inside advanced options — expand it first.

targets.name: Wizard tag toggle
targets.desc: Toggle one of the wizard tags by index.

targets.name: Wizard tag toggle
targets.desc: Toggle a tag in the task creation wizard.

targets.name: Wizard assignee option
targets.desc: Choose a teammate from the open assignee combobox list.
targets.onSuccess: Assignee set — the picker closed and the chosen teammate is now the assignee. Move on; do not reopen the picker unless you need a different person.

groups.name: Task detail dialog
groups.desc: Targets for editing an existing task.

targets.name: Task detail title
targets.desc: Edit the task title.

targets.name: Task detail assignee
targets.desc: Open the assignee picker in the task details dialog.

targets.name: Task detail status
targets.desc: Open the status picker in the task details dialog.

targets.name: Task detail priority
targets.desc: Open the priority picker in the task details dialog.

targets.name: Task detail due date
targets.desc: Edit the task due date.

targets.name: Task detail description
targets.desc: Edit the task description.

targets.name: Task detail estimated hours
targets.desc: Edit the task estimate.

targets.name: Cancel task changes
targets.desc: Close the task detail dialog without saving.

targets.name: Save task changes
targets.desc: Save edits made in the task details dialog.

targets.name: Task detail close
targets.desc: Close the task detail dialog.

targets.name: Task comment
targets.desc: Write a comment or opinion request on the task.

targets.name: Comment recipient
targets.desc: Choose which teammate the comment is addressed to.

targets.name: Post comment
targets.desc: Post the written comment to the task thread.

targets.name: Link related ticket
targets.desc: Open the picker to link a related or follow-up ticket.

targets.name: Task detail tag toggle
targets.desc: Toggle one of the task detail tags by index.

targets.name: Task detail tag toggle
targets.desc: Toggle a tag in the task detail dialog.

groups.name: Team members
groups.desc: Targets for member search, filtering, rows, and pagination.

targets.name: Member search
targets.desc: Search members by name or email.

targets.name: Member role filter
targets.desc: Open the member role filter.

targets.name: Member status filter
targets.desc: Open the member status filter.

targets.name: Member page size
targets.desc: Open the member table page size picker.

targets.name: Previous member page
targets.desc: Go to the previous member page.

targets.name: Next member page
targets.desc: Go to the next member page.

targets.name: Member row
targets.desc: Visible member table row by index.

targets.name: Member page button
targets.desc: Go to a numbered member page by index.

targets.name: Member row
targets.desc: Visible member table row.

targets.name: Create ticket for member
targets.desc: Open the new-task wizard with this member pre-assigned.

targets.name: Message member
targets.desc: Open the messenger conversation with this member.

targets.name: Member page button
targets.desc: Go to a numbered member page.

groups.name: Document viewer
groups.desc: Targets for selecting and controlling project documents.

targets.name: Refresh document
targets.desc: Reload the selected document iframe.

targets.name: Expand document
targets.desc: Toggle the document viewer height.

targets.name: Open document in new tab
targets.desc: Open the selected document in a new browser tab.

targets.name: Document iframe
targets.desc: The embedded selected document.

targets.name: Select document
targets.desc: Select one of the document cards by index.

targets.name: Select document
targets.desc: Select a document card for viewing.

groups.name: Workflow editor
groups.desc: Targets for workflow canvas controls, nodes, handles, and edges. Node positions are reported as stable canvas coordinates; browser_drag with destinationCoords moves a node to a canvas point (auto-converted to viewport).

targets.name: Workflow canvas pane
targets.desc: The interactive React Flow pane.

targets.name: Workflow zoom in
targets.desc: Zoom into the workflow canvas.

targets.name: Workflow zoom out
targets.desc: Zoom out of the workflow canvas.

targets.name: Workflow fit view
targets.desc: Fit the workflow to the viewport.

targets.name: Workflow interactive toggle
targets.desc: Toggle interactive mode for the workflow canvas.

targets.name: Workflow minimap
targets.desc: The workflow minimap viewport.

targets.name: Workflow node
targets.desc: A draggable workflow node by index.

targets.name: Workflow source handle
targets.desc: Connection source handle by index.

targets.name: Workflow target handle
targets.desc: Connection target handle by index.

targets.name: Delete workflow edge
targets.desc: Click a workflow edge by index to delete it.

targets.name: Workflow node
targets.desc: A draggable workflow node.

targets.name: Workflow source handle
targets.desc: Connection source handle for this node.

targets.name: Workflow target handle
targets.desc: Connection target handle for this node.

targets.name: Delete workflow edge
targets.desc: Click a workflow edge to delete it.

groups.name: Team messenger
groups.desc: Direct-message teammates: pick a conversation, type, and send.

targets.name: Message input
targets.desc: Type a direct message to the selected teammate.

targets.name: Send message
targets.desc: Send the typed direct message.

targets.name: Open conversation
targets.desc: Open one of the teammate conversations by index.

targets.name: Open conversation
targets.desc: Open the conversation with this teammate.

targets.name: Message bubble
targets.desc: A message in the current conversation.

groups.name: Open select options
groups.desc: Generic Radix select options visible after opening any select trigger.

targets.name: Select option
targets.desc: Choose one of the visible options from an open Radix Select list by index.

targets.name: Select option
targets.desc: Choose a visible option from an open Radix Select list.
targets.onSuccess: Option selected — the dropdown closed and the value is now set. Continue; do not reopen this dropdown unless you need to change the value.
